backend/main.mo: Motoko backend managing user profiles and per-user drone designs with access control and CRUD operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping product requirements to involved frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: List of concise descriptions for all major frontend source files in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining an OKLCH-driven color system for light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML document loading the React app entrypoint.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router and theme provider, defining routes for landing and workspace pages.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Header showing logo, navigation, auth status, login button, and profile setup dialog.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: App layout component rendering the header, main content outlet, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button integrating with Internet Identity and clearing query cache on sign-out.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Dialog prompting new authenticated users to enter their name and saves the profile.
frontend/src/components/auth/SignedInBad: Badge displaying the current user's initials and name once authenticated.
frontend/src/components/designer/Compone: UI panel for editing drone components, updating design state through form controls and selectors.
frontend/src/components/designs/MyDesign: Panel for saving, loading, and deleting user designs with dialogs and authentication checks.
frontend/src/components/preview3d/DroneM: Renders a 3D drone model based on design config, computing arm positions and component scaling.
frontend/src/components/preview3d/DroneP: Sets up a 3D canvas with controls, lighting, and renders the DroneModel with a ground plane.
frontend/src/components/summary/DesignSu: Displays calculated performance metrics and assumptions for the current drone design.
frontend/src/features/auth/useCurrentUse: React Query hooks for fetching and updating the current user's profile and role via an actor API.
Defines default drone design settings and lists selectable frame, motor, propeller, battery, and camera options.
frontend/src/features/designer/DesignSto: Context store managing the drone design state with update, load, and reset functions.
frontend/src/features/designer/types.ts: Provides TypeScript interfaces describing structure and fields of a drone design configuration.
frontend/src/features/designs/authGating: Supplies messages and logic for requiring authentication before performing design-related actions.
frontend/src/features/designs/queries.ts: Implements React Query hooks for listing, fetching, saving, and deleting drone designs via an actor backend.
frontend/src/features/designs/serializat: Handles versioned JSON serialization and deserialization of drone design configurations.
frontend/src/features/summary/assumption: Defines performance assumption functions and defaults for thrust, current draw, efficiency, and hover behavior.
frontend/src/features/summary/calc.ts: Computes drone performance metrics such as weight, thrust, and flight time using design data and assumptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes related queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hooks for Internet Identity login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS base styles and custom warm‑tone theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with query client and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Renders the landing page with hero section, features, and navigation buttons.
frontend/src/pages/Workspace.tsx: Defines the main workspace layout with resizable panels for component editing, 3D preview, design summary, and saved designs.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and managing hash-based routing values.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme, colors, fonts, animations, and plugins for the project’s styling system.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, feature definitions, requirements mappings, and image needs for the drone design website.
